item.title: Nuclear reactor company X-energy shares surge 27% as AI drives interest in its IPO
item.description: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy began trading Friday as the AI boom and electrification broadly spark a flurry of interest in the nuclear in...

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Intel, AMD, Charter, Hims & Hers, Eli Lilly and more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.

item.title: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
item.description: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.

item.title: Bettors on Kalshi now see Warsh likely confirmed by mid-May after DOJ drops Powell probe
item.description: Bettors on the platform now see an 86% chance that Warsh's nomination is confirmed by the U.S. Senate by May 15.

item.title: Risky meme trading is back. A trading rule change may have lit the fuse
item.description: A regulatory shift is expected to remove barriers to rapid-fire trading and help revive a meme-stock frenzy.
